import io
import string
import list

fn parse_ints(_ line: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut start = 0
  mut i = 0
  let n = string.len(line)
  while i < n
    let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
            when Some(x)
              x
            when None
              0
            end
    if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13
      if start < i
        let tok = string.substring(line, start, i)
        match string.parse_int(tok)
        when Some(v)
          result = list.push(result, v)
        when None
          ()
        end
      end
      start = i + 1
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if start < n
    let tok = string.substring(line, start, n)
    match string.parse_int(tok)
    when Some(v)
      result = list.push(result, v)
    when None
      ()
    end
  end
  result
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let line1 = match io.read_line()
              when Some(s)
                s
              when None
                ""
              end
  let line2 = match io.read_line()
              when Some(s)
                s
              when None
                ""
              end
  let nums = parse_ints(line1)
  let t = match string.parse_int(string.trim(line2))
          when Some(v)
            v
          when None
            0
          end
  mut out = ""
  mut first = true
  for x in nums
    if x > t
      if first
        out = "#{x}"
        first = false
      else
        out = "#{out} #{x}"
      end
    end
  end
  println(out)
end
